title: Plee
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Plee |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{Fact}} |pronouns=He/him{{Fact}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Green]] |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Overbreed? At the moment, unless they do over-breed, how in Kessel are we going to make any headway? They've given us a planet, and it's a planet we've got to get under control…|Plee|}} '''Plee''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]] development specialist whom the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Senate Select Committee for Refugees]] assigned to a team working on [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] the surface of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was chosen to be a refuge for the millions of [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] fleeing the advance of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]—an [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Species/Legends|species]] intent on conquering [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]—and Plee worked on developing plants suitable for reviving the planet. Disputes over priorities and a lack of resources made their task difficult. Plee and the team's mission was ultimately unfilled, as the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|captured]] the planet. ==Biography== {{Quote|I would like to petition for Sector Four of the reclaimed marshlands. I have several promising vegetative species under development.|Plee|}} [[File:Duro_habitation_domes.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Habitation domes on Duro, where Plee lived]] Plee was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]], a [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Moltok/Legends|Moltok]],''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]'' located in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] Trained as a plant development specialist, the pale-green Ho'Din gained a doctorate in his field of expertise. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], a tattooed and an aggressive [[Species/Legends|species]] from another galaxy, invaded the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. With numerous early successes, they caused a massive flow of refugees to other worlds of the Republic. To deal with this problem, the Republic formed the [[Senate Select Committee for Refugees]], commonly referred to as SELCORE.''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' By [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], Plee was one of a number of research scientists working for SELCORE, assigned to work on [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] the planet [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], under the management of former [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. The Select Committee, under pressure to a find refuge for the multitude of refugees fleeing the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] advance, had selected Duro, a long polluted world, as a resettlement location; however, with Duro's atmosphere polluted by dangerous gases, the refugees were forced to live under a series of SELCORE habitation domes. Plee, along with the [[Talz/Legends|Talz]] [[Aj Koenes]] and a number of other specialists, was tasked with restoring the planet to a habitable state. Plee developed a number of vegetative species for the planet, at one point petitioning for use of [[Sector Four (Duro)|Sector Four]] of some reclaimed marshlands in which to apply his work. However, the scientists struggled to form a unified plan, competing amongst themselves for scarce resources and the priority of their own projects; indeed, another scientist tried to claim Sector Four to use for grain projects. In addition to his own work, [[Doctor/Legends|Dr]]. Plee was particularly concerned with restoring the atmosphere of Duro, so that the residents could move out from the protective domes. He was also dismissive of concerns over ecological over-breeding, considering it a minimal problem given the vast barren planet. While the scientists made significant progress on making the surface habitable, the efforts of Plee and the rest to create a refugee sanctuary were ultimately in vain, as the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|captured]] the planet later that year, scattering the Republic citizens gathered there. The Yuuzhan Vong later worked on terraforming Duro, eventually restoring it to its lush natural state.''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Get this world seeded and clean it up, so we can take down these domes. I'm not claustrophobic, but –''"
"''The Sith you're not.|Plee and [[Aj Koenes]] argue|}} Plee was a scientist, gaining a doctorate in his field of plant development. Although he disputed it, Plee found living under the environmental domes claustrophobic. He wore a [[Laboratory/Legends|lab coat]], even to meetings. Plee had [[Color/Legends|green]] skin. ==Behind the scenes== Plee was created by [[Kathy Tyers]] for the [[2000]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'', the sixth novel in [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Plee }} [[Category:Ho'Din]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Scientists]]
